objects.name: Analytic 1720
objects.description: From the defender view: an app accesses UIPasteboard contents, sometimes repeatedly, including in background or immediately after another app copies sensitive text. iOS 14+ shows user notifications when pasting cross-app; unified logs reflect pasteboard access, notification, and optional subsequent persistence/exfil. We correlate: pasteboard access → optional cross-app notification → local write (cache/DB) and/or network egress within a short window.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: UIPasteboard read (general/string/data) by <bundle_id>; repeated reads or background access

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: \"has pasted from\" cross-app paste notification text containing source app name

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: CREATE/WRITE of clipboard dump artifacts in container (clipboard.db, clip_*.txt, caches)

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Foreground/background transition for <bundle_id> to contextualize access timing

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max time between pasteboard access → persist/exfil (e.g., 5–60s).
Minimum reads within window to flag harvesting (e.g., ≥2).
Regex for paste dumps in app container.
Require foreground state for benign use; flag background reads.
Work profile/MDM policy state to scope alerts.
